use of the specific supplies to be effectively furnished. 

The charge for nonroutine supplies is excluded from the per visit costs. 

Examples of supplies that can be considered nonroutine include, but are not limited to: 

1. Dressings/Wound Care 

• 
Sterile dressings; 
• 
Sterile gauze and toppers; 
• 
Kling and Kerlix rolls; 
• 
Telfa pads; 
• 
Eye pads; 
• 
Sterile solutions, ointments; 
• 
Sterile applicators; and 
• 
Sterile gloves.

3. Ostomy Supplies
